title: monitoring — declared entitlements
description: Nine entitlement keys. `monitoring_capture` is the boolean master gate. `monitoring_health_check_slot` / `monitoring_provider_slot` / `monitoring_alert_policy_slot` are integer capacity gates. `monitoring_paging` unlocks PagerDuty + Opsgenie on Medium+. `monitoring_apm` unlocks Datadog on Medium+. `monitoring_extended_retention` extends hot/cold windows on Enterprise. `monitoring_custom_metrics` unlocks custom_script + custom_metric signals on Enterprise. `monitoring_prometheus` unlocks the Prometheus pushgateway + AlertManager webhook on Enterprise.

entitlements.description: Master feature gate. Off = the whole module is invisible: no health checks, no alerts, no incidents, no provider CRUD. All tiers get this on — Small tenants get a reduced provider set via `monitoring_paging` = 0 + `monitoring_apm` = 0 + `monitoring_prometheus` = 0.
enforcedBy: HealthCheckObserver refuses creates when the gate is closed
MonitoringAlertPolicyObserver refuses creates when the gate is closed
SDUI monitoring surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'monitoring.core'

entitlements.description: How many health checks a tenant can configure. Small: 5 (typical: DB + Redis + queue depth + 1 HTTP endpoint + 1 disk). Medium: 25. Enterprise: unlimited. Consumed on health_check create; released on soft-delete.
How many provider configs a tenant can have. Small: 1 (typically Sentry OR Custom Webhook). Medium: 3. Enterprise: unlimited. Consumed on provider_config create; released on soft-delete.
How many alert policies a tenant may define. Small: 10. Medium: 50. Enterprise: unlimited.
Enables the PagerDuty + Opsgenie provider drivers. Small tenants can only use Sentry / Custom Webhook (dashboard-only notification path). Medium + Enterprise get true on-call paging.
enforcedBy: MonitoringProviderConfigObserver.creating refuses when provider IN ('pagerduty', 'opsgenie') AND gate is closed
SDUI provider picker filters the provider list per this gate

entitlements.description: Enables the Datadog provider driver. Medium + Enterprise. Small tenants can't push to Datadog (they can still use Sentry for error tracking).
enforcedBy: MonitoringProviderConfigObserver.creating refuses when provider = 'datadog' AND gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Extends health_check_runs retention from 7-day hot / 30-day cold to 30-day hot / 90-day cold. Extends monitoring_alerts retention from 30d / 90d to 90d / 1-year. Extends monitoring_incidents to indefinite retention (P1 incidents never auto-purged for postmortem archive).
enforcedBy: PurgeExpiredHealthCheckRunsJob checks this gate + applies extended retention when set
PurgeResolvedIncidentsJob checks this gate + applies extended retention + skips P1 incidents when set

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Unlocks the `custom_script` health_check_type + the `custom_metric` signal_type. Small + Medium tenants use only the built-in check types + signal types (db_ping / redis_ping / http_endpoint / … + error_rate / latency_p95 / …).
enforcedBy: HealthCheckObserver.creating refuses when check_type = 'custom_script' AND gate is closed
MonitoringAlertPolicyObserver.creating refuses when signal_type = 'custom_metric' AND gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Unlocks the Prometheus provider driver — both the pushgateway (outbound metrics) and the AlertManager webhook receiver (inbound alerts from tenant's own Prometheus).
enforcedBy: MonitoringProviderConfigObserver.creating refuses when provider = 'prometheus' AND gate is closed
